name: No Fuss Tuna Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Bake the pastry shell for 5 minutes; remove from rack and cool.
3. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F.
4. For the filling, whisk together milk and eggs in a bowl.
5. Stir in onions, pimiento, basil, and salt.
6. Fold in tuna and cheese. Pour into the prebaked pastry shell.
7. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, steam broccoli spears over simmering water for 5 minutes; drain and set aside.
9. After 30 minutes, arrange broccoli spears in a spoke-fashion over the quiche.
10. Bake for an additional 25-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted 2 inches from the center comes out clean.
11. Let stand for 5 minutes.
12. Cut into 8 wedges, centering a broccoli spear in each wedge.
